email_subject: Sollicitatie — Online Sales en IT Support Medewerker
email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Online Sales en IT Support Medewerker bij ITZU. Uw oproep voor een veelzijdige medewerker die zowel online verkoop als IT-ondersteuning combineert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en interesses.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het verwerken van weborders, het beantwoorden van klantvragen en het coördineren van leveringen via online marktplaatsen. Daarnaast bied ik interne IT-ondersteuning bij hardware- en softwareproblemen en werk ik mee aan IT-projecten. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO stelt mij in staat om snel IT-vraagstukken op te lossen en processen te optimaliseren.

Ik werk nauwkeurig, klantgericht en proactief, en ik ben gewend om zowel zelfstandig als in teamverband te functioneren. Mijn kennis van Nederlands (B1) breid ik actief uit, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the position of Online Sales and IT Support Employee at ITZU. Your call for a versatile employee who combines online sales with IT support perfectly matches my experience and interests.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for processing web orders, answering customer questions, and coordinating deliveries via online marketplaces. I also provide internal IT support for hardware and software issues and collaborate on IT projects. My technical background in web design and SEO enables me to quickly resolve IT issues and optimize processes.

I work accurately, customer-oriented, and proactively, and I am used to functioning both independently and in a team. My Dutch (B1) is actively improving, and I speak fluent English and Turkish.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and experience in a personal conversation.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I handle online sales processing, customer service, and internal IT support for hardware, software, and network issues. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data and technical audits. Comfortable with e-commerce platforms, order management, and IT troubleshooting. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Online sales & customer service: web order processing, online marketplace sales, customer inquiry handling, delivery coordination
- IT support: hardware, software, and network troubleshooting; IT project follow-up; internal IT infrastructure management
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Process web orders and manage sales via online marketplaces
- Answer and resolve customer inquiries, coordinate deliveries
- Provide first-line internal IT support for hardware, software, and network issues
- Follow up on IT projects and implementations, assist with internal IT infrastructure management
- Maintain contact with external IT partners when needed
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
